message:
feat(inference): Add core posterior computation and conjugate models

- Add inference/posterior.rs: P(C|x) computation with log-domain normalization
  - CPU evidence (Beta PDF / Beta-Binomial marginal likelihood)
  - Runtime evidence (Gamma log-likelihood)
  - Binary features via Beta-Bernoulli (orphan, tty, net, io_active)
  - Categorical features via Dirichlet-Categorical (state_flags, command_categories)
  - Evidence term decomposition for explainability
  - Log-odds abandoned/useful computation

- Add pt-math bernoulli.rs: Beta-Bernoulli conjugate model
  - Posterior updates with η-tempering (Safe-Bayes)
  - Predictive probabilities and log predictive
  - Log marginal likelihood and Bayes factors
  - Credible intervals via Beta inverse CDF
  - 36 unit tests including golden values

- Add pt-math binomial.rs: Beta-Binomial conjugate model
  - Posterior predictive for count data (e.g., CPU ticks)
  - Log marginal likelihood with η-tempering

Closes: process_triage-e48, process_triage-m99, process_triage-3ot

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
